headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: - 12.5 The Subcontractor agrees that monies received for the performance of this Subcontract shall be applied  to  the  cost  of  performing  the  Subcontract  Work  and  said  monies  shall  not  be  diverted  to  satisfy  other obligations of the Subcontractor.
